## Product Description

**Fra-Ber Ko Iron | 4.54L Professional | Ferrous Decontaminant | Violet Visual Effect | Concentrated Gel Formula** 

**Fra-Ber Ko Iron 4.54L** is a **high-capacity professional ferrous decontaminant** specially developed for **intensive use in body shops, detailing centers, and commercial applications** . This **professional version** offers **maximum efficiency** in removing iron particles, rust, brake dust, and mineral deposits accumulated on the body, wheels, and glass, providing **significant savings** for users who process multiple vehicles. 

**With an advanced concentrated gel formula** , Ko Iron 4.54L effectively removes even the most stubborn stains that conventional washing can remove. The **distinct violet visual effect** clearly indicates ferrous contamination, ensuring **thorough and precise cleaning** with every application. The **large-volume packaging** offers **superior performance** and **a lower cost per application** , making it ideal for **professionals who value efficiency and savings** . 

🌟 **Main Features** 

✔ **Professional packaging 4.54L** – optimized volume for intensive use 

✔ **Advanced Iron Remover** – Eliminates brake dust, rust and pollution 

✔ **Violet visual effect** – clear indication of ferrous contamination 

✔ **Concentrated gel formula** – superior adhesion and extended action time

✔ **Professional income** – significant savings per application 

✔ **Low odor** – formula with less sulfur smell 

✔ **Cherry aroma** – pleasant experience during use 

✔ **Total versatility** – wheels, bodywork, glass and plastics 

✔ **Fra-Ber Quality** – Italian professional reference brand 

📌 **Technical Specifications** 

**Product:** Fra-Ber Professional Ferrous Decontaminant 

**Model:** Ko Iron 

**Content:** 4.54 Liters (professional format) 

**Code:** 700210 

**Type:** Iron Remover / Ferrous Decontaminant 

**Application:** Vehicle exterior (professional use) 

**Surfaces:** Wheels, bodywork, glass, plastics 

**Format:** Professional refill packaging 

**Concentration:** Concentrated gel formula 

**Yield:** Approximately 90-180 applications (depending on dilution) 

**Storage:** Cool, dry place 

**Validity:** See original packaging 

🔧 **Advantages of the 4.54L Professional Version** 

**Operational Economy:** • **Reduced cost per application** - savings of up to 40% vs. small packaging 

• **Higher yield** - up to 180 applications depending on dilution 

• **Fewer replenishments** - stock optimized for intensive use 

• **Efficient packaging** - less material waste 

• **Improved ROI** - superior return on investment 

**Professional Efficiency:** • **Intensive use** - suitable for multiple daily vehicles 

• **Consistency** - same quality in large volumes 

• **Versatility** - multiple dilutions as needed

• **Practicality** - refilling sprayers 

• **Productivity** - less time wasted on replenishments 

🧼 **Detailed Professional Applications** 

**Detailing Centers:** • **Pre-polishing preparation** - removal of ferrous contaminants 

• **Complete decontamination** - before applying coatings 

• **Premium wheel cleaning** - without damaging delicate finishes 

• **Fleet maintenance** - efficient processing of multiple vehicles 

• **Specialized services** - catering and preparation for competitions 

**Mechanical Workshops:** • **Post-repair cleaning** - removal of welding residues 

• **Brake maintenance** - cleaning accumulated dust 

• **Preparation for painting** - decontamination before priming 

• **Cleaning of components** - exposed metal parts

• **Washing services** - complement to basic services 

**Professional Car Wash:** • **Premium service** - competitive differentiation 

• **Specialized packages** - decontamination as an extra 

• **Preventive maintenance** - protection against oxidation 

• **Demanding customers** - luxury and sports vehicles 

• **Fidelity** - visible results that impress 

📦 **Professional Dilution Instructions** 

**Light Contamination (1:2):** • **Mixture:** 1.5L Ko Iron + 3L water = 4.5L solution 

• **Applications:** ~90 vehicles 

• **Usage:** Regular maintenance, light dusting 

• **Action time:** 2-3 minutes 

**Moderate Contamination (1:1):** • **Mixture:** 2.27L Ko Iron + 2.27L water = 4.54L solution 

• **Applications:** ~60 vehicles

• **Use:** Brake dust, urban pollution 

• **Action time:** 3-4 minutes 

**Heavy Contamination (Pure):** • **Mixture:** 4.54L Ko Pure Iron 

• **Applications:** ~45 vehicles 

• **Use:** Rust, severe contamination 

• **Action time:** 4-5 minutes 

🎯 **Who is it recommended for?** 

▸ **Professional detailing centers** - daily intensive use 

▸ **Specialized mechanical workshops** - quality services 

▸ **Premium car wash** - competitive differentiation 

▸ **Vehicle tuners** - competitions and exhibitions 

▸ **Corporate fleets** - preventive maintenance 

▸ **Product distributors** - professional resale 

▸ **Mobile detailers** - operational savings 

▸ **Detailing schools** - professional training

🔧 **Professional Use Protocol** 

**Preparation:** 

- 

**Check temperature** - cold surface, no sun exposure 

- 

**Prepare equipment** - sprayers, brushes, hose 

- 

**Protective equipment** - gloves, glasses, suitable clothing 

- 

**Dilute as needed** - assess contamination level 

**Systematic Application:** 

- 

**Preliminary test** - small area to check reaction 

- 

**Uniform application** - complete surface coverage 

- 

**Controlled action time** - 2-5 minutes depending on contamination 

- 

**Observation of the violet effect** - visual indicator of effectiveness 

- 

**Agitation if necessary** - soft brush in severe cases 

**Finalization:** 

- 

**Rinse thoroughly** - complete removal of the product 

- 

**Result verification** - detailed visual inspection 

- 

**Repeat if necessary** - until complete elimination of contamination 

- 

**Proper drying** - preparation for next steps 

**Inventory Management:** 

- 

**Proper storage** - cool, dry and ventilated place 

- 

**Temperature control** - avoid thermal extremes 

- 

**Inventory turnover** - FIFO (First In, First Out) 

- 

**Usage record** - consumption and income control 

💡 **Professional Economic Benefits** 

**Cost Analysis:** • **4.54L Ko Iron:** €X per liter 

• **Average yield:** 90-180 applications 

• **Cost per vehicle:** €0.XX - €0.XX 

• **Savings vs 750ml:** Up to 40% savings 

**Competitive Advantages:** • **Improved margin** - reduced cost, maintained price 

• **Differentiated service** - unique visible results

• **Customer loyalty** - professional quality 

• **Fewer replacements** - logistics optimization 

**Calculated ROI:** • **Initial investment:** Cost of packaging 4.54L 

• **Revenue per application:** Price charged to the customer 

• **Payout period:** Approximately 15-30 applications 

• **Net profit:** Higher margin than small packages 

🚗 **Professional Compatibility** 

**Luxury Vehicles:** • **Mercedes-Benz** - S-Class, Maybach 

• **BMW** - 7 Series, X7 

• **Audi** - A8, Q8 

• **Porsche** - Panamera, Cayenne 

• **Jaguar** - XJ, F-Pace 

**Commercial Fleets:** • **Rent-a-car** - preventive maintenance 

• **Corporate fleets** - corporate image 

• **Representation vehicles** - impeccable presentation

• **Executive transport** - premium standard 

**Special Vehicles:** • **Classics and collections** - specialized care 

• **Sports** - preparation for events 

• **Modified** - maintenance of special components 

• **Competition** - specialized technical cleaning 

⚠️ **Professional Precautions** 

**Operational Safety:** • **Mandatory PPE** - gloves, glasses, appropriate clothing 

• **Adequate ventilation** - well-ventilated spaces 

• **First aid** kit available on site 

• **Staff training** - correct and safe use 

**Professional Storage:** • **Suitable location** - cool, dry, ventilated 

• **Signage** - clear product identification 

• **Controlled access** - authorized personnel only

• **Movement record** - stock control 

**Responsible Disposal:** • **Local legislation** - environmental compliance 

• **Neutralization** - if necessary before disposal 

• **Empty packaging** - proper recycling 

• **Documentation** - disposal records 

📦 **Professional Packaging Contents** 

**Included:** • **1x Fra-Ber Ko Iron 4.54L** - professional packaging 

• **Original packaging** - with all technical information 

• **Safety data sheet** - detailed information 

• **Instructions for use** - professional protocol 

**Not Included (purchase separately):** • **Sprayers** - for diluted application 

• **Protective equipment** - gloves, glasses 

• **Application brushes** - for severe cases

• **Meters** - for precise dilutions 

**IMPORTANT:** The 4.54L professional version of the Fra-Ber Ko Iron offers maximum savings and efficiency for heavy users. It requires proper storage and responsible use as per the safety data sheet. Ideal for detailing centers, workshops, and car washes that process multiple vehicles daily, providing significant savings and consistent professional results.
